This week’s edition is loaded up with tons of great sales, with notable opportunities on e-bikes from Lectric, Velotric, and Aventon, the latter of them having recently expanded to include even more of the newest-generation smart e-bikes at their best prices starting from $1,599, not to mention the ongoing e-scooter and electric dirt bike deals, too. We also have our favorite power station brands offering massive Earth Day Sale savings, with EcoFlow and Anker SOLIX currently offering some additional weekend flash sales on a variety of models worth checking out. All these and so much more are waiting for you below!

It’s dropping down from $1,300 here after sitting higher at a Prime-exclusive $1,000 rate since the last time we saw this price during March’s Big Spring Sale. These two newer-gen models usually go for $1,999 since hitting the market last year, with discounts having only gone as low as $1,799, which we last saw during the brand’s New Year Sale in January. You can learn more about these particular e-bikes below, and browse the full lineup of expanded deals in our original coverage here.

items.title: Exclusive $870 savings hits Anker’s eufy E15 RTK robot lawn mower with pure vision FSD cameras + AI support at a new $930 low
items.summary:
Along with the sitewide exclusive bonus savings we secured on a number of Anker eufy security devices and robot cleaners, we also have a specific exclusive code for the brand’s eufy E15 Robot Lawn Mower for $929.99 shipped, after using the code 9T5E15 at checkout, beating the direct website’s current Earth Day sale pricing and Amazon by $20. It’s down from an $1,800 full price, which strangely has climbed as high as $2,300 at Amazon, and with our exclusive bonus savings code the costs are now dropping lower than ever. With this deal, you’ll be getting a $870 markdown to a new all-time low price, beating out the previous $950 low that you’d be paying without our code.

items.summary:
Update 4/17: The Space Black 24GB/1TB M5 MacBook Pro has just dropped in price on Amazon to $1,764 shipped. That’s $235 under the late 2025 launch price and $135 under the new MSRP after Apple upgraded the storage tiers last month. This is the best price of the year on this model. 

While some of the MacBook Pro deals we were featuring earlier this week have now jumped back up in price, you can land the silver M5 24GB/512GB model at the lowest price we have tracked in 2026.

Buy for $255 (Reg. $300)

What we love

If you have a compact space and want to make the most of it, a sofa like this is worth a peek. Not only can it work as a standard couch, but also a recliner or a bed.
